title.en: Such a distant place, he didn't know what it was.

content.en:
The other nine invincibles in Ye Tian's same squad also received a box and a road map, and the final point of this road map was a mysterious place.

There is no standard name on it, but it is very far away from the Tianlin Realm, and even if it passes through this route, it will take millions of years to travel, and it will pass through countless exotic worlds.

Such a distant place, he didn't know what it was.

Soon, Ye Tian's team set off, and directly left the Tianlin Realm through a third-order gate in the Tianfeng Sea, appeared in an exotic world, and immediately began to advance along the road map through this exotic world.

On the road.

During the passage, a fourth-class invincible named Qingou asked curiously, "Do you know what the items are escorted on this mission, and where is our destination?"

"I don't know!"

Everyone shook their heads one by one.

"I may have guessed the destination, but what the item is, then I don't know!" Another female invincible Qiongyu spoke, "My parents are members of the Heavenly Wind Sea, but I was born in an exotic world, and I have been in the Heavenly Wind Sea for a long time, at least tens of thousands of eons. As a result, I know information that many invincibles do not know. For example, this place, if I am not mistaken, should be the location of an eternal heaven and earth!"

"Another eternal world?" the crowd was surprised.

Qiongyu immediately added: "To be exact, it is a broken eternal heaven and earth. The eternal heaven and earth can exist forever, and if it is a special circumstance, it will not be annihilated, but that eternal heaven and earth was shattered in a great war, and a special situation occurred, which caused it to evolve into a special area, which seems to contain great opportunities, and even the supreme will enter there to find opportunities. Therefore, it is very cruel there, but it is not as comfortable as the Tianlin Realm, even the third- and fourth-class invincibles are just cannon fodder there, and they dare not step into it easily, otherwise they will be easily killed by the more powerful invincibles. "

"So, our task is to deliver the box somewhere in this shattered eternal world and give it to someone?"

Ye Tian said.

"It should be so!" Qiongyu nodded, "I just don't know what the item is, otherwise it's in the box in our hands?, but this mission is very dangerous, the enemy may dispatch more fourth-class invincibles or even third-class invincibles, if we are unlucky enough to be discovered by the enemy, we will almost definitely die, so we must be slower, do not show our breath, and slowly tear apart the barriers of the exotic world, so that other invincibles must not be discovered." "

......

Windy Mountain.

The Qingyang Supreme of the Heavenly Wind Sea and several other Supremes were discussing.

"Qingyang Supreme, has the plan been arranged?"

Another first-class invincible of the Heavenly Wind Sea, Tulong Supreme, asked.

Qingyang Supreme nodded and said: "It has been arranged, a pair of ten invincibles, all of them have been sent out, the Eternal Source Soul Soul Lapis has been brought by the ten fourth-rank invincibles we have secretly cultivated, and the strength of each of them is comparable to the third-rank invincibles, without the enemy knowing the specific situation, there is more than ninety percent hope that the Soul Lapis can be sent to the Yuanji Abyss." Once the leader obtains the Soul Bluegold, not only can he repair his injuries, but he can also break through to the Supreme Realm in one fell swoop, and then he will not be afraid of other Eternal Name-level forces!"

"During this time, let's not go out, otherwise we won't survive once we are attacked and killed by the Supreme One. "

"Well, you can't go out, in the Tianlin Realm, there are the three supreme beings, and the supreme beings of the Netherworld Hall will not break the rules to attack us Tianfeng Sea. But outside the Tianlin Realm, they have no scruples, and the three supreme beings can't control them. "

"The Supreme cannot enter the Yuanji Abyss, the people we send can directly enter the Yuanji Abyss through the Exotic Heaven and Earth at that time, although the Supreme can enter the Exotic World, but they need to pay a certain price, and the Exotic Heaven and Earth are endless, and they don't know our plans, it is difficult to find people. Therefore, our success rate is still very large. "

"Hmph, the supreme of the Netherworld Temple is really too much, the leader can find an opportunity to break the shackles in the Yuanji Abyss, and there is hope to be promoted to the supreme, the first-class invincible of the Netherworld Temple can't compete, so he wants to kill the leader, and he also wants to destroy our Tianfeng Sea!"

"The Netherworld Temple has one more supreme than us, the invincible level, and they are not much stronger than us. "

"It's a pity that these fourth-class invincibles, I'm afraid they will suffer heavy losses this time, if there are invincible people who survive, give them enough benefits!"

Ye Tian and the others didn't know that Tianfeng Hai had offended an eternal name-level force and a supreme being, otherwise everyone would be terrified.

After all, this matter involves the supreme being, if they know the truth, who can not panic? or even surrender in fright.

This is why Tianfeng Hai kept it secret, and let them make an oath, and let them set off as soon as possible, without giving them time to prepare, in order to prevent them from having a chance to defect, otherwise once the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple contacted them, then this plan would be over.

Meanwhile.

An order was issued from inside the Netherworld Temple, and a dense group of invincible people were dispatched, going to the exotic world to find the whereabouts of the invincible people of the Heavenly Wind Sea.

The Netherworld Temple also has an internal response in the Heavenly Wind Sea, so it knew which people had taken this task at the first time, collected the information of these fourth-class invincibles, and once they encountered it, they immediately killed them and recaptured those boxes.

And when the Netherworld Temple was playing with the Heavenly Wind Sea, many invincible people in the Exotic Heaven and Earth were miserable, and they would be killed by mistake if they were not careful.

Ye Tian also felt the change in the situation, so he took a group of elites of the Terran Race and directly entered the Feather Heaven and Earth, which had been regarded by him as the secret world of the Terran Race, and now it was hidden, so it would not be easily discovered.

And the Dark Forbidden Realm will not have the existence of invincibles, so it will naturally not attract the attention of the Netherworld.

It can be said that Ye Tian's move to prevent the human race and the Dark Forbidden Domain from being affected by the Netherworld Temple can be regarded as a fortunate thing.

As time slowly passed, coupled with the Netherworld's efforts to find the traces of the invincible in the Heavenly Wind Sea at all costs, and even mobilized many reconnaissance treasures to search across exotic worlds, they really found some invincibles.

As a result, an invincible person was fighting with the invincible people of the Netherworld Temple, and Xia fell.

And Ye Tian and the others did not escape the pursuit, and were intercepted by a group of fourth-class invincible people in an exotic world.
